aesthetic: Dotted-Quad — the RFC plaintext & address-space allocation schematic
anchor: The IETF/RFC plaintext-memorandum tradition crossed with network-operations cartography: 72-column monospaced RFCs with ASCII box-drawing, the IANA address-allocation block-map, BGP/transit route diagrams, and the green-phosphor terminal.
rationale: The corpus's primary sources ARE numbered RFC plaintext memoranda (791, 1631, 6598, 8200, MASQUE 9297/9298/9484) with the 'Network Working Group' masthead and ASCII packet-header diagrams; the address-space story is literally cartographic (IANA block-map). The aesthetic is the artifact, not a costume. Cool, forensic, instrument-grade — never persuasive.

fonts.display: 'Courier New', Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', ui-monospace, monospace
fonts.mono: 'Courier New', Consolas, 'SF Mono', 'DejaVu Sans Mono', ui-monospace, monospace
